recommendations.title: AI-Powered Growth Bundle
recommendations.description: Growth plan + Marketplace assets + AI compute bundle
recommendations.rationale: Bundle reduces cognitive load; 30% revenue uplift over standalone growth plan

recommendations.title: Annual Commitment Incentive
recommendations.description: Offer 20% discount for annual upfront payment to secure ARR
recommendations.rationale: Annual commits reduce churn by ~60%; net revenue positive even with discount

recommendations.title: Churn Prevention Offer — 23 at-risk customers
recommendations.description: 30% discount + success manager assigned to 23 at-risk accounts
recommendations.rationale: Preventing churn at 30% discount is 7× cheaper than acquiring new customer

recommendations.title: Freemium Conversion Optimization
recommendations.description: Optimize 48 trial → paid conversion (current: 2%)
recommendations.rationale: 48 active trials; improving conversion by 1% adds ~480 MRR

recommendations.title: AI Credit Metering — Usage-Based Upsell
recommendations.description: Surface credit consumption patterns to trigger natural upsell moments
recommendations.rationale: Usage-based triggers convert 3× better than time-based nudges
